2.title: CPU Usage
2.query:
timeseries ratio1m = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.virtualserver.stat.vs.usage.ratio1m),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:virtualserver }
| fieldsAdd f5:virtualserver_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:virtualserver)
| sort arrayAvg(ratio1m) desc
| limit 20

3.title: System CPU
3.query:
timeseries system1m = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.sys.global.host.cpu.system1m),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:instance }
| fieldsAdd f5:instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:instance)
| sort arrayAvg(system1m) desc
| limit 20

4.title: User CPU
4.query:
timeseries user1m = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.sys.global.host.cpu.user1m),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:instance }
| fieldsAdd f5:instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:instance)
| sort arrayAvg(user1m) desc
| limit 20
